steps.title: Match both parts of the claim
steps.content: The researcher claims that controlled fear can boost mood and confidence. The best participant quotation must show both an improved emotional state and a confidence-related benefit after the haunted house.

steps.title: Require mood and confidence
steps.content: Choice B mentions friends laughing but not fear or confidence. Choice C shows fear fading without a mood or confidence boost. Choice D mentions relief and a comparison to scary movies but not confidence. The remaining quotation gives both accomplishment and lower stress. The answer is A.
